name: Study 4: Baseline Characterization — Cardiometabolic Triad vs Dyad
description: Comparative baseline profiles for Study 4 high-burden vs lower-burden cardiometabolic cohorts.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization of cardiometabolic triad vs dyad cohorts. Profiles demographics, comorbidities, medication use (statins, antihypertensives, antidiabetics), BMI measurements, and clinical procedures to understand the multimorbidity burden landscape.
